{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Overlord soulfire
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] poured his [[Overlord soulfire]] into [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
